languages.text: Разведотряды один за другим отправляют свои шаттлы еще ближе к планете-ядру. Спустя несколько минут после отправления ни один из них не выходит на связь. Развед-шаттлы навеки продолжают дрейфовать по орбите планеты-убийцы.
One by one, the scouting teams send their shuttles even closer to the planet core. Minutes later, contact ends with all of them. The scouting shuttles continue to orbit the murderous planet forever.
languages.original_text: Разведотряды один за другим отправляют свои шаттлы еще ближе к планете-ядру. Спустя несколько минут после отправления ни один из них не выходит на связь. Развед-шаттлы навеки продолжают дрейфовать по орбите планеты-убийцы.

traits.locale_text: One by one, the scouting teams send their shuttles even closer to the planet core. Minutes later, contact ends with all of them. The scouting shuttles continue to orbit the murderous planet forever.

One by one, the scouting teams send their shuttles even closer to the planet core. Minutes later, contact ends with all of them. The scouting shuttles continue to orbit the murderous planet forever.

languages.text: 探査チームは、惑星コアに近づいていく。数分後、探査チームは惑星コアに到達した。探査チームは、凶暴な惑星を永遠に周回する。
languages.original_text: One by one, the scouting teams send their shuttles even closer to the planet core. Minutes later, contact ends with all of them. The scouting shuttles continue to orbit the murderous planet forever.

traits.locale_text: 探査チームは、惑星コアに近づいていく。数分後、探査チームは惑星コアに到達した。探査チームは、凶暴な惑星を永遠に周回する。

languages.text: Uno a uno, los equipos de exploración acercan sus lanzaderas al núcleo del planeta. Minutos después, el contacto con todas se interrumpen. Las lanzaderas de exploración seguirán orbitando el planeta asesino eternamente.
languages.original_text: One by one, the scouting teams send their shuttles even closer to the planet core. Minutes later, contact ends with all of them. The scouting shuttles continue to orbit the murderous planet forever.

traits.locale_text: Uno a uno, los equipos de exploración acercan sus lanzaderas al núcleo del planeta. Minutos después, el contacto con todas se interrumpen. Las lanzaderas de exploración seguirán orbitando el planeta asesino eternamente.

languages.text: 侦察队接连派出穿梭机，不断向行星核心靠近。几分钟后，所有联络同时中断。那些侦察穿梭机将永远环绕这颗致命的小行星。
languages.original_text: One by one, the scouting teams send their shuttles even closer to the planet core. Minutes later, contact ends with all of them. The scouting shuttles continue to orbit the murderous planet forever.

traits.locale_text: 侦察队接连派出穿梭机，不断向行星核心靠近。几分钟后，所有联络同时中断。那些侦察穿梭机将永远环绕这颗致命的小行星。

languages.text: Ein Shuttle nach dem anderen wagt sich noch näher an den Planetenkern heran. Einige Minuten später bricht der Kontakt mit allen Shuttles ab. Fortan treiben sie für alle Zeit im Orbit des mörderischen Planeten.
languages.original_text: One by one, the scouting teams send their shuttles even closer to the planet core. Minutes later, contact ends with all of them. The scouting shuttles continue to orbit the murderous planet forever.

traits.locale_text: Ein Shuttle nach dem anderen wagt sich noch näher an den Planetenkern heran. Einige Minuten später bricht der Kontakt mit allen Shuttles ab. Fortan treiben sie für alle Zeit im Orbit des mörderischen Planeten.

languages.text: Keşif ekipleri, mekiklerini birer birer gezegen çekirdeğine daha da yaklaştırıyor. Dakikalar sonra hepsiyle temas kesiliyor. Keşif mekikleri sonsuza dek o katil gezegenin yörüngesinde dönmeye devam ediyor.
languages.original_text: One by one, the scouting teams send their shuttles even closer to the planet core. Minutes later, contact ends with all of them. The scouting shuttles continue to orbit the murderous planet forever.

traits.locale_text: Keşif ekipleri, mekiklerini birer birer gezegen çekirdeğine daha da yaklaştırıyor. Dakikalar sonra hepsiyle temas kesiliyor. Keşif mekikleri sonsuza dek o katil gezegenin yörüngesinde dönmeye devam ediyor.

languages.text: Une par une, les équipes de reconnaissance dirigent leur vaisseau de plus en plus près du noyau de la planète. Quelques minutes plus tard, vous perdez tout contact avec les navettes, qui continuent à tourner en orbite autour de la planète meurtrière.
languages.original_text: One by one, the scouting teams send their shuttles even closer to the planet core. Minutes later, contact ends with all of them. The scouting shuttles continue to orbit the murderous planet forever.

traits.locale_text: Une par une, les équipes de reconnaissance dirigent leur vaisseau de plus en plus près du noyau de la planète. Quelques minutes plus tard, vous perdez tout contact avec les navettes, qui continuent à tourner en orbite autour de la planète meurtrière.
